title: Choose Troupes
content:
All players start with an equal number of characters. Choose a faction and select characters belonging to it.

**Troupe Size Recommendations:**
• 2-Player Game: 6 characters each
• 3-Player Game: 4 characters each
• 4-Player Game: 3 characters each

**Cross-faction characters** can be selected by troupes belonging to either parent faction. Each character can only be selected for your troupe once.
